x-enumeration-literals.name: Session Orchestrator
x-enumeration-literals.description: Manages the dialogue state, continuity, and transitions across communication channels.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Supervisor / Escalation Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides oversight, quality assurance, and handles escalations if the dialogue cannot be resolved at the agent level.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Representative / Proxy
x-enumeration-literals.description: Acts on behalf of the customer (e.g., parent, assistant, legal representative, corporate buyer).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Automated Assistant (Bot / IVR / Virtual Agent)
x-enumeration-literals.description: System-based role interacting with the customer to gather context, authenticate, or handle requests autonomously.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authentication & Identity Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms the customer’s identity and permissions for the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Agent / Advisor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Human representative engaging directly with the customer to resolve issues or fulfill requests.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The individual initiating or participating in the dialogue to fulfill a need, request, or query.
